description_long: This object is a road work warning setup consisting of a large, orange, diamond-shaped sign mounted on a collapsible tripod stand. The sign is weathered and displays the text 'ROAD WORK AHEAD' in black, with visible dents and scratches indicating heavy outdoor use. The tripod legs are metallic and painted orange with black accents, providing stability on uneven surfaces. Accompanying the sign are two additional safety devices: a striped metal barricade and an orange traffic cone with a reflective white band. The barricade is constructed from metal and features diagonal orange and white stripes, while the cone is made of rubber or plastic. This ensemble is typically used to alert drivers and pedestrians to upcoming road work and to demarcate hazardous zones.
description: A weathered orange diamond sign reading 'ROAD WORK AHEAD' is mounted on a sturdy tripod, accompanied by a striped barricade and an orange traffic cone.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full face of the sign with clear text, the tripod stand, the striped barricade to the left, and the traffic cone to the right.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thin profile of the sign and tripod, with the cone directly behind the stand and the barricade partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the sign, the tripod structure, the barricade to the right, and the cone to the left.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the tripod's legs and the edge of the sign, with the barricade behind and the cone not visible.
